import {React, useEffect, useState} from 'react' import { Link } from 'react-router-dom' import axios from 'axios' export default function Home() { const [products, setProducts] = useState([]) useEffect(() => { getAllProducts() } ,[]) const getAllProducts = async() => { const res = await axios.get('http://localhost:1700/backend/product') setProducts(res.data) } return (
